name: @mog/xlsx-tooling
description: Dev tooling for the XLSX parser — benchmarks, memory tests, corpus scripts, profiling

scripts.test:memory:all: cd ../.. && npx tsx --expose-gc xlsx/tooling/tests/memory/memory-wasm.test.ts && npx tsx --expose-gc xlsx/tooling/tests/memory/memory-heap.test.ts && npx tsx --expose-gc xlsx/tooling/tests/memory/leak-detection.test.ts && npx tsx --expose-gc xlsx/tooling/tests/memory/memory-budget.test.ts
scripts.bench:all: cd ../.. && npx tsx --expose-gc xlsx/tooling/benchmarks/large-files.ts && npx tsx --expose-gc xlsx/tooling/benchmarks/feature-benchmarks.ts && npx tsx --expose-gc xlsx/tooling/benchmarks/real-world.ts && npx tsx xlsx/tooling/benchmarks/compare.ts
scripts.corpus:generate: cd ../.. && npx tsx xlsx/tooling/scripts/generate-test-files.ts && npx tsx xlsx/tooling/scripts/generate-realistic-files.ts && npx tsx xlsx/tooling/scripts/generate-edge-cases.ts
scripts.corpus:all: cd ../.. && npx tsx xlsx/tooling/scripts/generate-test-files.ts && npx tsx xlsx/tooling/scripts/generate-realistic-files.ts && npx tsx xlsx/tooling/scripts/generate-edge-cases.ts && npx tsx xlsx/tooling/scripts/validate-corpus.ts
